response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years of experience, solid open-source background, Linux/Unix familiarity, and relevant founding experience at GISCollective showing architectural ownership. However, the resume lacks explicit formal team leadership or Head-of-Development experience, no UML or Python is listed, and German proficiency is only Basic — well below the required C1 level, which is a significant blocker for this role.
strengths: Extensive 15+ year track record across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong open-source orientation and founder experience with GISCollective on Linux/Kubernetes
Demonstrated mentorship via workshops, talks, and TDD/craftsmanship advocacy
concerns: German listed as Basic, far below required C1 proficiency
No explicit formal leadership/Head-of-Development role or team management scope shown
Python and UML — both listed as desired/required — are absent from skills

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and open-source/Linux experience
Missing formal leadership track record and UML/Python
